name: dashboard-v3
description: PC端营销数据 Dashboard — Exness/Vantage C-Level 管理层

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FE,BE -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.typecheck: cd frontend && npm run typecheck && cd ../backend && npm run typecheck
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.diagram: mmdc -i docs/architecture.mmd -o docs/architecture.svg -t dark -b transparent && mmdc -i docs/c4-context.mmd -o docs/c4-context.svg -t default -b white --scale 2 && mmdc -i docs/c4-container.mmd -o docs/c4-container.svg -t default -b white --scale 2 && mmdc -i docs/architecture-sequence.mmd -o docs/architecture-sequence.svg -t default -b white --scale 2
